title: 22:17 ГўВҖВ” June 24, 2022
body_text:
22:17 ГўВҖВ” June 24, 2022
Electronic Bill Payments System Part Updates
We clarified content regarding requirements and options for setting up new billers on the Electronic Bill Payments System.
Billers that choose to participate in Central 1ГўВҖВҷs Electronic Bill Payments System must be registered with their own financial institution. This ensures due diligence and increases Central 1ГўВҖВҷs level of security. If a biller is registered with your financial institution, Central 1 can set up the biller on the system with minimal effort. If a biller is registered with a different financial institution (e.g., Royal Bank), the biller should initiate enrollment through that financial institution. In this case, the billerГўВҖВҷs financial institution can send the enrollment information to Central 1 to facilitate the billerГўВҖВҷs set-up with Central 1 and other financial institutions.
Bill Payments Volume
Electronic Bill Payments System Part
Section 2.2, Frequently Asked Questions
We added this section.
Section 4.1, Overview of Setting up Billers on the Electronic Bill Payments System
We added content to clarify that new billers must be registered with a financial institution before they can be added to Central 1ГўВҖВҷs Electronic Bill Payments System.
Section 4.3, Providing Enrollment Documents to a Biller
We added instructions to clarify information requirements for ГўВҖВңAccount Validation RulesГўВҖВқ on the Biller Enrollment Request, Form 1320.
Section 5.1, Viewing Biller Information ГўВҖВ“ Financial Institutions Outside of Ontario
We renamed this section to ГўВҖВңViewing Biller Information on the EBP Billers ListingГўВҖВқ.
Section 5.2, Viewing Biller Information ГўВҖВ“ Financial Institutions in Ontario
We renamed this section to ГўВҖВңViewing Biller Information on Bill Payment Vendor InformationГўВҖВқ. This section only applies to financial institutions in Ontario that use 9-digit vendor numbers.
